                                                 x 
                                                 , 
                                                 y 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                              ⪯ 
                                              
                                                 { 
                                                 u 
                                                 , 
                                                 z 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                              ⪯ 
                                              
                                                 { 
                                                 v 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                              ⪯ 
                                              
                                                 { 
                                                 w 
                                                 , 
                                                 y 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                           
                                         (and  
                                           
                                              
                                                 { 
                                                 u 
                                                 , 
                                                 x 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                              ⪯ 
                                              
                                                 { 
                                                 u 
                                                 , 
                                                 x 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                           
                                        ) is compatible. 
                                  
                                  
                                     (2) 
                                     Even if a curriculum admits an adequate prerequisite-structure, it may not be the most efficient curriculum (e.g., regarding  Example 4.4 , the prerequisite-structure  
                                           ⪯

                                           ⪯

                                              u 
                                              , 
                                              x 
                                              } 
                                           
                                         can be eliminated from the curriculum without forfeiting any tasks). On the other hand, sometimes there exist pedagogical benefits to requiring learners to encounter tasks multiple times in a curriculum (e.g., the context in which a given topic is presented often varies from course to course), and it may be counterproductive to whittle curricula into fragmented collections of tasks. Nevertheless, it seems valuable to determine whether  
                                           C 
                                         contains a proper sub-curriculum that admits a compatible prerequisite-structure while covering every task that is covered in  
                                           C 
                                        , particularly in cases where  
                                           C 
                                         admits no compatible prerequisite-structure. The next corollary provides complete answers to such inquiries.

The above results show that an adequate curriculum  
                                           C 
                                         admits a compatible prerequisite-structure if and only if the partial order  
                                           
                                              
                                                 ⪯ 
                                              
                                              
                                                 C 
                                              
                                           
                                         is a compatible prerequisite-structure on  
                                           C

                                         on the curriculum

                                        ) is compatible.

Even if a curriculum admits an adequate prerequisite-structure, it may not be the most efficient curriculum (e.g., regarding  Example 4.4 , the prerequisite-structure  
                                           ⪯ 
                                         defined in  (1)  above may be preferred over

                                           ⪯

                                              u 
                                              , 
                                              x 
                                              } 
                                           
                                         can be eliminated from the curriculum without forfeiting any tasks). On the other hand, sometimes there exist pedagogical benefits to requiring learners to encounter tasks multiple times in a curriculum (e.g., the context in which a given topic is presented often varies from course to course), and it may be counterproductive to whittle curricula into fragmented collections of tasks. Nevertheless, it seems valuable to determine whether  
                                           C 
                                         contains a proper sub-curriculum that admits a compatible prerequisite-structure while covering every task that is covered in  
                                           C 
                                        , particularly in cases where  
                                           C 
                                         admits no compatible prerequisite-structure. The next corollary provides complete answers to such inquiries.

A proof of  Theorem 4.7  is given to close this section.

The above sections develop a template for curricular assessment that, in theory, provides minimum structure by which curricula should abide. In practice, a program must first identify courses along with the tasks therein, and then collect data to determine whether the characteristics of a functional curriculum are being met. But a student’s progression of achievement is also impacted by the manner in which a program’s standards of success are interwoven into its curricular structure, and students who succeed in prerequisite courses of well-designed curricula are not always immune to the scourge of insufficient preparation. How do varying standards of success fit into the theory that is outlined in the previous sections?

It is usually not realistic to expect that every task that is covered in a program’s curriculum is completed by learners who receive the program’s certification. 
                         2 
                      
                      
                         2 
                         The apprehensive student finds encouragement in the alliterative proverb “Cs earn degrees”. 
                       Typically, an attempt is made to determine whether a learner has met a given benchmark, from which it is agreed that the learner should be awarded some form of a “pass”. In the wake of watered-down interpretations of “student-success”, new obstacles become evident.

The next definition articulates a pitfall associated withweighted curricula, and the following example illustrates its manifestation.

                                     } 
                                  
                                  | 
                                  < 
                                  
                                     
                                        n 
                                     
                                     
                                        c 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            .

Therefore, a permissive curriculum is a weighted curriculum containing a weighted course  
                         
                            ( 
                            c 
                            , 
                            
                               
                                  n 
                               
                               
                                  c 
                               
                            
                            ) 
                         
                       that may be impossible to pass by a learner who passes all of the prerequisites for  
                         c 
                      . A permissive curriculum is exhibited in  (1)  of the example below.

Example 5.2 
                         
                            
                               
                                  (1) 
                                  Let  
                                        
                                           C 
                                           = 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              
                                                 { 
                                                 u 
                                                 , 
                                                 y 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                              , 
                                              
                                                 { 
                                                 w 
                                                 , 
                                                 y 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                              , 
                                              
                                                 { 
                                                 v 
                                                 , 
                                                 x 
                                                 , 
                                                 z 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                      be an adequate curriculum, where the order on  
                                        
                                           ⋃ 
                                           C 
                                        
                                      is generated by  
                                        
                                           u 
                                           ⋖ 
                                           v 
                                        
                                     ,  
                                        
                                           w 
                                           ⋖ 
                                           x 
                                        
                                     , and  
                                        
                                           y 
                                           ⋖ 
                                           z 
                                        
                                     . It is clear that the prerequisite-structure on  
                                        C 
                                      generated by  
                                        
                                           
                                              { 
                                              u 
                                              , 
                                              y 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           ⪯ 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              v 
                                              , 
                                              x 
                                              , 
                                              z 
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                      and  
                                        
                                           
                                              { 
                                              w 
                                              , 
                                              y 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           ⪯ 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              v 
                                              , 
                                              x 
                                              , 
                                              z 
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                      is compatible, while setting  
                                        
                                           c 
                                           = 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              v 
                                              , 
                                              x 
                                              , 
                                              z 
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                      and  
                                        
                                           I 
                                           = 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              y 
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                      in  Definition 5.1  shows that the weighted curriculum  
                                        
                                           W 
                                           = 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 
                                                    { 
                                                    u 
                                                    , 
                                                    y 
                                                    } 
                                                 
                                                 , 
                                                 1 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                              , 
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 
                                                    { 
                                                    w 
                                                    , 
                                                    y 
                                                    } 
                                                 
                                                 , 
                                                 1 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                              , 
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 
                                                    { 
                                                    v 
                                                    , 
                                                    x 
                                                    , 
                                                    z 
                                                    } 
                                                 
                                                 , 
                                                 2 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                      is permissive. Intuitively, a learner may pass the weighted courses  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              u 
                                              , 
                                              y 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           , 
                                           1 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      and  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              w 
                                              , 
                                              y 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           , 
                                           1 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                      by only becoming sufficient to complete  
                                        y 
                                     , and may lack the sufficiency to complete the tasks  
                                        u 
                                      and  
                                        w 
                                      required to complete  
                                        v 
                                      and  
                                        x 
                                     , respectively. Consequently, such a learner would not have the ability to meet the standard for passing the weighted course  
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              v 
                                              , 
                                              x 
                                              , 
                                              z 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           , 
                                           2 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                     , even though all of the prerequisites for the course were met. 
                               
                               
                                  (2) 
                                  Let  
                                        
                                           C 
                                           = 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              
                                                 { 
                                                 u 
                                                 , 
                                                 v 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                              , 
                                              
                                                 { 
                                                 w 
                                                 , 
                                                 x 
                                                 , 
                                                 y 
                                                 } 
                                              
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                      be an adequate curriculum, where the order on  
                                        
                                           ⋃ 
                                           C 
                                        
                                      is generated by  
                                        
                                           u 
                                           ⋖ 
                                           v 
                                           ⋖ 
                                           w 
                                        
                                     ,  
                                        
                                           u 
                                           ⋖ 
                                           x 
                                        
                                     , and  
                                        
                                           u 
                                           ⋖ 
                                           y 
                                        
                                     . The prerequisite-structure on  
                                        C 
                                      given by  
                                        
                                           
                                              { 
                                              u 
                                              , 
                                              v 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           ⪯ 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              w 
                                              , 
                                              x 
                                              , 
                                              y 
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                      is compatible, and it is clear that the weighted curriculum  
                                        
                                           W 
                                           = 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 
                                                    { 
                                                    u 
                                                    , 
                                                    v 
                                                    } 
                                                 
                                                 , 
                                                 1 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                              , 
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 
                                                    { 
                                                    w 
                                                    , 
                                                    x 
                                                    , 
                                                    y 
                                                    } 
                                                 
                                                 , 
                                                 2 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                      is not permissive; indeed, every semi-ideal  
                                        I 
                                      of  
                                        
                                           ⋃ 
                                           C 
                                        
                                      contains  
                                        u 
                                     , so  
                                        
                                           
                                              { 
                                              x 
                                              , 
                                              y 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           ⊆ 
                                           
                                              { 
                                           
                                           z 
                                           ∈ 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              w 
                                              , 
                                              x 
                                              , 
                                              y 
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        | 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 z 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       ≲ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       ⋃ 
                                                       C 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           ⊆ 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              w 
                                              , 
                                              x 
                                              , 
                                              y 
                                              } 
                                           
                                           ∪ 
                                           I 
                                           
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                     .

The following question is left unanswered.

Question 5.3 
                         
                            Under what conditions can the permissiveness of a weighted curriculum be detected?

Under what conditions can the permissiveness of a weighted curriculum be detected?

The authors wish to express their sincere gratitude to the anonymous referees. Their careful readings and insightful comments led to many improvements, and resulted in a more scholarly and readable exposition. Also, the authors would like to thank Anne Ray Streeter, whose compassion and commitment to student success kindled the inception of this research.
